ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contact_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact status */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the status (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "user_contact_id" TEXT /* User-provided contact identifier */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact status */,
  "failed_attribute" TEXT /* Attribute causing the contact to be invalid */,
  "user_line" TEXT /* The full line of the contact record as provided by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact was last updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the contact */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES contact_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_failed_attribute FOREIGN KEY ("failed_attribute") REFERENCES contact_attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in managing contacts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "previous_status_id" INTEGER /* Previous status of the contact */,
  "new_status_id" INTEGER /* New status of the contact */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_previous_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_status_id") REFERENCES contact_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_new_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_status_id") REFERENCES contact_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the attribute is required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)
